title: Magave Kitchen Core
description: A core mod for the Magavé Kitchen Modpack to work as intended, unifying cooking methods.
body:
Unifies some mods cooking recipes (Candlelight, Farmers Delight, Kaleidoscope Cookery) to all be cooked using the same cooking pot/cooking pan. Specifically made for the Magavé Kitchen Modpack. 
A big thanks to Porject8gbDeRam!
